projects.title: Appointments App for Businesses
projects.description: A comprehensive booking system that allows clients to schedule services online while providing business owners with an intuitive dashboard for managing appointments and staff availability.

projects.title: Booking Clone
projects.description: A high-performance travel meta-search engine clone featuring complex filtering systems, real-time availability checking, and a responsive UI for seamless property browsing.

projects.title: Sapir Skincare
projects.description: An elegant e-commerce landing page and catalog for a beauty brand, focused on high-end aesthetic presentation and smooth user experience with advanced animations.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: A robust online marketplace with features like persistent shopping carts, secure checkout integration, and an admin panel for inventory and order management.
